Our Services

Our SMETA Audit Services

Gap Assessment

Documentation Support

Score Optimization

EcoVadis Training

Gap Assessment

A detailed gap analysis to benchmark your current sustainability performance and create a tailored roadmap to improve your EcoVadis score.

Strategic Roadmap

Custom action plan with short, medium, and long-term score improvement.

ESG Benchmarking

Assess current ESG practices, EcoVadis standards, and industry-leading peers.

Readiness Insights

Identify priority areas to enhance your sustainability maturity before submission.

Understanding

SMETA Audit Pillars

Environment

Labor & Human Rights

Ethics

Sustainable Procurement

Environment

Focused on how companies manage their environmental responsibilities, including policies, emissions, resource use, and their overall climate impact.

Environmental Policies

Assessment of environmental policies, certifications, and key programs.

Energy & Emissions

Review of energy usage, GHG accounting, and reduction initiatives.

Impact Management

Assessment of waste, water, biodiversity, and pollution control practices.

FAQs

On The Side of Ambitious

 Action 

We help brands stand out and grow by creating innovative, results-driven strategies that engage customers and drive success.

What is EcoVadis and why is it important?

EcoVadis is a globally trusted sustainability ratings platform that evaluates the Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) performance of companies across supply chains. It assesses businesses on four key themes—Environment, Labour & Human Rights, Ethics, and Sustainable Procurement. A strong EcoVadis rating enhances your company’s reputation, strengthens stakeholder trust, supports responsible sourcing, and opens doors to new business opportunities, especially with multinational clients demanding transparency and accountability.

How does the new EcoVadis scoring and medal system work?

EcoVadis now uses a medal and badge-based recognition system instead of numerical scores. Companies are assessed across four sustainability themes—Environment, Labour & Human Rights, Ethics, and Sustainable Procurement. Based on performance, organizations may earn medals (Bronze, Silver, Gold, or Platinum) or theme-specific badges that highlight excellence in one or more areas. This new approach provides a clearer, more comparable way to benchmark ESG maturity while encouraging continuous improvement.

What is the fee for the EcoVadis assessment?

he fee for an EcoVadis assessment varies depending on factors such as your company’s size, sector, geographic footprint, and the level of service or features selected (e @media (max-width: 767px) { } /* 2. Explore More

You might also Be Interested In…!!!

ESG Reporting

ESG Reporting refers to the structured disclosure of a company’s Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) performance. It enables businesses to demonstrate how they manage risks and opportunities across climate change, resource efficiency, human rights, ethical governance, diversity, and more. In today’s investor-driven, regulation-focused environment, ESG reporting is no longer optional—it’s a strategic imperative. ESG disclosures influence investment decisions, consumer trust, regulatory compliance, and corporate reputation.

Read More

ESG Reporting

Net Zero u0026 Decarbonisation

Net Zero is no longer a distant ambition, it’s a business-critical commitment. At Growlity, we help organizations chart their Net Zero transformation with robust GHG accounting, practical decarbonisation strategies, and alignment with frameworks like the GHG Protocol, ISO 14064, SBTi, and CDP. Whether you’re just beginning your decarbonisation journey or already setting net zero targets, our sustainability consultants deliver tailored solutions that are strategic, science-based, and results-driven.

Read More

Net Zero u0026 Decarbonisation

CDP Reporting

CDP is a globally recognized environmental disclosure system that enables organizations to report their carbon emissions, climate-related risks, and environmental performance. Trusted by thousands of investors, companies, and cities, CDP plays a critical role in driving climate transparency and accountability. As a CDP consultant and disclosure partner, Growlity empowers organizations to navigate the full CDP reporting framework, enhance data quality, and improve scores. Our expert support ensures climate compliance, strengthens sustainability disclosures, and reinforces stakeholder trust—positioning your business for credible, low-carbon growth.

Read More

CDP Reporting
